titleStmt.title: SII 36.274: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 274. (A.R. No. 274 of 1910.) TIRUVAḌANDAI, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west wall of the central shrine in the Varāha Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: Twelve families belonging to the local community of fishermen (paṭṭiṉavar) and all their descedants were ordained to do service to the Vishṇu temple and to pay a tax amounting to 9 kaḻañcus of gold. The sabhā and ūr agreed to utilize the money for celebrating a seven-day festival called Rājarājadēvar-tirunāḷ on the occasion of Sataiyam (nakshatra) in the month of Āvaṇi (the birth asterism of Rājarāja I), in the temple of Tiruviḍavandai, a dēvadāṉa of Paḍuvūr-nāḍu in Āmūrk-kōṭṭam. The inscription was engraved under the supervision of the controller of the coast and an administrator of the Nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumakaḷ polap perunilac celviyun taṉakkeyurimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷa kāntaḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttaṟuḷi veṅkai nāṭuṅ kaṅka pāṭiyum nuḷampa pāṭiyum taṭikai vaḻiyum kuṭamalai nāṭum
kollamum kaliṅkamum Āḻkaṭalīḻamum tiṇṭiṟal veṟṟit taṇṭāṟ koṇṭu taṉneḻil vaḷar Ūḻi Ellāviyāṇṭun toḻutakai viḷaṅkumiyāṇṭey ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrī kovirājakecarivanmarkku yāṇṭu patinṉeḻāvatu
Āmūrk koṭṭattup paṭuvūr nāṭṭut tevatāṉam tiruviṭavantai Āḻvār śrīvarāha tevarkku Ivvūrilt tirunārāyaṇappar nilam paṭṭiṉavarteri paṟṟuṅkuṭikaḷ pūcāṉ vaṭukaṉ Araṅkaṉum cāttantai tiruppori cāttaṉum nākantai pottaṉ Arayaṉum Aḻakaṉ nārāyaṇa
n tāḻiyum centāḻi kuppaṉ kumāraṭiyum pūcāṉ kaliyaṉ caṭṭiyum Iṉpūlaṉ Ōṟṟimāṉ miṟaiyum Ukkin=taccaṉ cīlaṉ Aḷattiyum koṟṟaṉ teṟaṉ kumarāṭitkaṇanum Ālantāḻi tiṭṭaippaḷḷi Iṭarnīkkiyum Aḻakaṉ Araiyaṉ puliyaṉum pūcāṉ kaliyaṉ taṉavaṉumāka Ippaṉireṇ
ṭu kuṭiyum neycum kaṭalpukkum Ivarkaḷiṭak kaṭava Iṟaip pon perāl mukkālāka poṉ Onpatin kaḻaiñcum tiṅkaḷtoṟum Epperppaṭṭa Iṟaiyuṅ koṇṭu śrī rājarājatevar tirunāḷ Āvaṇic cataiyamāka muṉpu Ēḻu nāḷun tiruviḻāc ceyyavum tirumañcaṉañ ceytaruḷināl
c cārtti Aruḷa kaḻaiñcu poṉ per Iraṇṭu tirupparicaṭṭam tirunāḷk kaḷiraṇṭilum Iṭakkaṭavarkaḷākavum tirunāḷiraṇṭanu(ma)kkum tirukkoṭikkūṟai Iṭakkaṭavarkaḷākavum tirunāḷkkaḷiraṇṭilum tīrttam pirācātikkum Anṟu Amutu ceytaruḷinapaṭiye tiruppāvāṭaiyoṭu pirasātam peṟakkaṭavar
kaḷākavum pākila mutalikaḷi Iruvarkkum paricaṭṭam peṟak kaṭavarkaḷākavum Ippaṭi cantrā(ca)tittavaṟ muṭṭāmai ceyvikkak kaṭavom Ivvūrc cavaiyomum Ūromum Ippaṭṭiṉavar paṉniraṇṭu kuṭiyum puttarapavitrātikaḷ Āḻvārk key tiruppaṇi ceyvārkaḷākavum
Ipparicu Ittiruviḻāc cantrātittavaṟ ceyya vaiyttom Iṉnāṭṭu kaṇṭukāṭcci cuṅkamumkaraiyuñ ceykiṟa māṅkuṭaiyān Irāmaṉ kumāranāṉa coḻamūventaveḷa mārāyanum Iṉnāṭuvakaiceykiṟa Eḻilūr kiḻavan kaṟṟanātittaṉāna tānamū
ven=taveḷān mārāyanum Ivviruvom cilālekai ceyvittom Ittanmattukku Ayitam cevār keṅkaiyiṭaik kumariyiṭaic ceytār ceyta pāvaṅ koḷvār śrī vayiṣṇavar rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 36.274 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
